section.heading: Rules of construction

subsection.heading: Construction of “First Became a Member”.—
subsection.content: For purposes of this chapter and other provisions of law providing for computation of retired or retainer pay of members of the uniformed services, a person shall be considered to first become a member of a uniformed service on the date the person is first enlisted, inducted, or appointed in a uniformed service.

subsection.heading: References in Tables.—
subsection.content: Section references in tables in this chapter are to sections of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 99–348, title I, § 105, July 1, 1986, 100 Stat. 691.)
